configFiles.template:
[Configuration]
BasedOn=..\Engine\Config\BaseGame.ini

[Engine.AccessControl]
; if left blank then no player may login as admin
AdminPassword=${RconPassword}
; Password required to enter the game
GamePassword=${PrivatePassword}

[AAGame.AAAccessControl]
; 5 minute ban time
VoteKickBanTime=300
ROEKickBanTime=600

[Engine.GameInfo]
DefaultGame=AAGame.AAGameDevelopment
DefaultServerGame=AAGame.AAGameDevelopment
GameDifficulty=+1.0
;This is the number of spectators in addition to the number of players
MaxSpectators=8
MaxPlayers=${Slots}
;Time limit no longer has any affect
TimeLimit=0
;Time in seconds before a player will be moved to spectator team for being idle
MaxIdleTime=61
;If set to false then players will not be kicked for being idle
bKickLiveIdlers=true
bAdminCanPause=true

[Engine.GameReplicationInfo]
;The name of the server as displayed on the server info screen as well as the scoreboard
ServerName="${Hostname}"

[AAGame.AAGameInfo]
GameplayEventsWriterClassName=Engine.GameplayEventsWriter
bLogGameplayEvents=false
GameSettingsUpdateInterval=20.0
bAutoDemoRecEnabled=false
DemoRecDir=
TimeToSelfKill=20.0
InitialConnectionKillTimeout=90.0
AAMaxPlayersAllowed=32


;This list determines which maps the server will rotate through
[AAGame.AADataStore_OnlineGameSearch]

[AAGame.AAGameMultiplayerBase]
; Minimum number of players to wait for before starting the match
MinNetPlayers=2
; Time after MinNetPlayers join to wait for more players
NetWait=60
;Time spent in weapon selection and communication
BeginningOfRoundDelay=12
;Extra time spent in weapon selection and communication for swap round
SwapRoundDelay=6
; False - match ends early if one team wins over half the rounds
; True - match will be played for all rounds, regardless of team score
bPlayAllRounds=false
; Time spent (in seconds) in WarmUpMode before the server triggers another UGC Maps Update
ServerNeedsUGCMapsUpdateDelay=600
; A flag indicating that the server should auto-update UGC maps
bServerSteamUGCAutoUpdate=true

[AAGame.AAGamePVPBase]
bScaleWithNumPlayers=true
; These override MaxPlayers in production maps
MaxTeamSizeBDX=6
MaxTeamSizeFLO=12
; If > 0, these override the map TimeLimits
TimeLimitOverrideBDX=180
TimeLimitOverrideFLO=240
; Maximum number of rounds per match
RoundsPerMatchBDX=15
RoundsPerMatchFLO=15

[AAGame.AAGameReplicationInfo]
;Time in seconds before a flash or frag grenade may be thrown
ForbidGrenadeTimeFLO=0
ForbidGrenadeTimeBDX=0
;If true, then players must use autopick to choose their team
bDefaultOnlyAllowAutoPick=false
;Refers to aim assist when using a controller
bDefaultAllowControllerAimAssist=true
bOnlineVoiceEnabled=true
;The server owner name, website and hosting company and admin name and email, if filled out, appear on the Server Info screen
sDefaultServerOwnerName=
sDefaultServerOwnerWebsite=
sDefaultServerHostingCompany=
sDefaultAdminName=
sDefaultAdminEmail=
;The message of the day is displayed on the team select screen (first screen seen when joining a game) and on the server info screen
sDefaultServerMOTD="Visit the forums! forum.americasarmy.com"
;The admin message is displayed on the server info screen
sDefaultAdminMessage="Welcome to AA Proving Grounds!"
;toggles Kick Player voting
bDefaultAllowKickPlayerVoting=false
;toggles Change Map voting
bDefaultAllowChangeMapVoting=true 
;toggles Set Next Map voting
bDefaultAllowSetNextMapVoting=true 
;toggles Restart Mission voting
bDefaultAllowRestartMissionVoting=true 
;toggles Scramble Teams voting
bDefaultAllowScrambleTeamsVoting=true 
;If NumberOfVotes >= NumberOfVoters / VoteKickRate, the vote to kick a player will be passed.
DefaultVoteKickRate=2.25
DefaultVoteDuration=15
;When true players may vote for the next map at the end of a match
bDefaultAllowAARMapVoting=true
;When true hard core mode is enabled - NOTE - this feature is no longer officially supported any may not work as expected
;Hard core = Reduced HUD and no revives
bDefaultHardcoreMode=false
;If true then teams will attempt to balance numbers at the start of each round
bDefaultAutoBalanceTeams=true
;When true friendly fire damage is reduced
bDefaultReduceFriendlyFire=true
;When true players are punished for ROE violations (ROE = dealing large amount of damage to friendlies)
bDefaultROEEnabled=true
;When false players bleed to 1% and then stop bleeding
bDefaultAllowBleedOut=true
;When false disables the minimap dot for enemies that have fired recently
bDefaultAllowEnemyFireMapDot=true
;When true weapons will reload automatically once the current magazine is expended
bDefaultAutoReloadEnabled=true
;When false players cannot be revived following a head shot
bDefaultReviveOnHeadshots=true
;The number of times a player may be revived
MaxRevives=1
;When false all character shadows for all clients are forced off
bDefaultShadowsAllowed=true
;When true anchoring is allowed
bDefaultAnchoringAllowed=true
;When true the minimal HUD option is forced on for all clients - NOTE - this feature is no longer officially supported any may not work as expected
bHUD_ForceMinimalHUD=false
;When false the active players for each team is not displayed on the HUD and only friendlies are displayed on the scoreboard
;NOTE - this feature is no longer officially supported any may not work as expected
bDefaultHUD_ForcePlayerCountOff=true
;When false enemy spots only appear on the minimap - NOTE - this feature is no longer officially supported any may not work as expected
bDefaultHUD_ForceInWorldEnemySpots=true
;When true the messages for when a player kills another are turned off for all clients - NOTE- this feature is no longer officially supported any may not work as expected
bDefaultHUD_ForceActivityFeedOff=false
;No longer used
bHUD_ForceHitIndicatorOff=true
bAllowAdminSpectate=true
bAllowSpectateMode_ActionCam=true
bAllowSpectateMode_3pOrbit=true
bAllowSpectateMode_FreeCam=true
;When true, players on the spectate team experience suppression, flash grenades and other screen FX
bDefaultForceSpectateTeamScreenFX=false
;When false, prevents spectators from seeing occluded mesh outlines
bDefaultAllowOccludedMeshSpectate=true
;When true, will use the roles setup as dictated by the map
bDefaultUseRoles=true
;When true, the server will do hit detection instead of the client
bDefaultUseServerSideHitDetection=false
;When true, the server will allow global VoIP for all players
bDefaultAllowGlobalVoiceChat=true
;When true, the server will allow VoIP for all spectators
bDefaultAllowSpectatorVoiceChat=true
;When true, the server will allow text chat for all players
bDefaultAllowGlobalTextChat=true
;Time that must pass before prone can be attempted again
ProneRetryTimer=1.0
;Allows RPG pickups to be used
bAllowRPGPickup=true
;Whether or not AAU-related systems should be called
bEnableAAUDatabaseService=true
;Whether or not AWS-related systems should be called
bEnableAWSServiceServer=true
bEnableAWSServiceClient=true
;See Kartigan
bDefaultAllowSpecial=false

[Engine.WorldInfo]
bShowLightingRebuildMessage=TRUE
DecalManagerClassPath=AAGame.AADecalManager

[DefaultPlayer]
Name=Player
team=255

[Engine.PlayerController]
ForceFeedbackManagerClassName="WinDrv.XnaForceFeedbackManager"

[Engine.DecalManager]
;The time in seconds bullet decals and grenade scorch marks hang around
DecalLifeSpan=30.0

[AAGame.AAPlayerController] 
;How many times a player can hit friendlies before incurring an ROE violation
FriendlyFireHitLimit=4
;These are all client-side settings
bPunkbusterMsgs=false
bHoldToSprint=false
bDoubleTapSprint=false
bGrenadesInWeaponCycle=false
fMasterVolume=1.f
fMusicVolume=0.8f
fUIVolume=0.8.f
fSoundEffectsVolume=100.f
fVOVolume=100.f
bMuteWhenFocusLost=true
bMuteVOIPWhenFocusLost=false
bVOIPEnabled=true
;This refers to the music which plays at the 30 second mark in a round
bRoundEndWarningMusic=true
Audio_VoiceSelection=255
bDisplayNumPing=true
bCameraBob=false
sNonAuthSoldierName=DidNotSetName
VIPProbabilityRank=VPROB_Normal
bParentalLock_Violence=false
bParentalLock_VOIP=false
bParentalLock_Chat=false
bUseDualRenderScopes=false
GameSettingsUpdateInterval=15
;Is actually the cosine of the angle between the view and target.
;This should be a large enough area that it has a target before the aim assist
;systems activate on it.
AimAssistTargetAngle=.94
AimAssistTargetAngleLarge=.9
;How often to check for a new aim assist target.  Also, if framerate is not
;above this value it will skip aim assist target checks
AimAssistTargetSearchTime=0.1f
;Softening angle for aim adhesion.  When within this radius, the strength will
;fade out of the aim adhesion system.  This will scale with distance.  The
;value here is for a close range target.
AimAdhesionSoftenAngle=0.99993
AimAdhesionMinSoftenAngleStrength=0.75
;ConfigStrength * this value of change is the max change per frame for aim adhesion
AimAdhesionInterpSpeed=0.001
AimSnapDelay=2
bSwitchToWeaponOnPickup=true
PawnCamoIdx[0]=-1
PawnCamoIdx[1]=-1
PawnCamoIdx[2]=-1
PawnCamoIdx[3]=-1
PawnCamoIdx[4]=-1
HeadPreference[0]=HEAD_Random
HeadPreference[1]=HEAD_Random
HeadPreference[2]=HEAD_Random
HeadPreference[3]=HEAD_Random
HeadPreference[4]=HEAD_Random
BadgePreference=0
GearPreference[0]=0
GearPreference[1]=0
GearPreference[2]=0
GearPreference[3]=0
GearPreference[4]=0
bShowOccludedMeshes=true
; the window to open if the bug report method is one of AAPC_RM_SteamOverlay or AAPC_RM_DefaultBrowser
BugReportURL="http://bugreport.americasarmy.com/"
; one of AAPC_RM_SteamOverlay, AAPC_RM_DefaultBrowser, AAPC_RM_ExternalApplication (the last one is not implemented)
BugReportMethod=AAPC_RM_DefaultBrowser
; the window to open if the commend/report player method is one of AAPC_RM_SteamOverlay or AAPC_RM_DefaultBrowser
CommendOrReportPlayerURL="http://www.americasarmy.com/support/abuse"
; one of AAPC_RM_SteamOverlay, AAPC_RM_DefaultBrowser, AAPC_RM_ExternalApplication (the last one is not implemented)
CommendOrReportPlayerMethod=AAPC_RM_DefaultBrowser
PlayerInfoURL="https://my.goarmy.com/info/form/GetBrcFormRedirectByUrl.action?url=/info/send1"
fSafeArea=1.0
bAdminIncognito=True
; Weapon to force at startup
; Primaries: ak105,ak107,czalpha,m4a1,m16a4,scarh,mp7a1,m870,supernova,m249,rpk,dragunov,m14ebr,m24,sv98,rpg7
; Sidearms: cz2,m9,m17,m1911
AdminForcedWeapon=
;Classes to force: rifleman,autorifleman,marksman,sniper
AdminForcedRole=

[AAGame.AAPawn]
; Pawn relative speed indicates target pawn is moving, for aim adhesion
AimAdhesionRelativeVelocity=0.005

; Low speed is for bHighAnim targets, when the target is moving
AimAdhesionInterpSpeedLow=1.5
; High speed is for all other cases
AimAdhesionInterpSpeedHigh=15

; Range 0 to 1, where 1 is 100%; if not 0, aim adhesion will function when
; the player's pawn is not moving or rotating
; if zero, aim snap will not function unless player's pawn is moving
AimAdhesionNonMovingStrengthModifier=0.001

; When running, modifies the strength of aim adhesion
AimAdhesionRunningStrengthModifier=0.25

; When running, modifies the strength of aim friction
AimFrictionRunningStrengthModifier=0.25

; Aim friction distance modifiers , where aim friction is max strength up to
; the min and is at min strength at the max distance.  
AimFrictionMinDistance=500
AimFrictionMaxDistance=3000

; Modifies the AimFriction max speed by adding: (GamepadSensitivity * this)
; for the lower axis curve, and twice that amount for the higher axis curve
; **Compensates for differing gamepad sensitivity levels
AimFrictionGamepadSensitivityMod=0.05

; Reduces the gamepad axis speed by a percentage, depending on if the axis is
; using the low speed (inner area), or high speed (outer edges).  Recommend
; the high speed be twice the low speed.  This value also has the above value
; added to it.  Example:  At 1 GamepadSensitivity the friction strength is
; (1 * 0.05) + 0.25 = 0.3  or at high speed: 0.05 + 0.05 + 0.50 = 0.6
AimFrictionMaxStrength[0]=0.25
AimFrictionMaxStrength[1]=0.50

; Range 0 to 2, where 2 indicates Right and Up axis are at 100%
; When the combined value of the Right and Up axis's are below this value
; it will scale the strength of aim adhesion by the distance of 
; 0 to <specified value>.  This is for lightening up aim adhesion for minor
; aim corrections
AimAdhesionRawJoyMin=0.5

; Sets aim snap to target the aim assist bone target instead of the center 
; position of the target pawn
AimSnapTargetBones=true

+SightCheckBones=Head
+SightCheckBones=L_Shoulder
+SightCheckBones=R_Shoulder
+SightCheckBones=Pelvis
+SightCheckBones=L_Knee
+SightCheckBones=R_Knee

; Bone names for AimAssist to check for target aquisition
; this list MUST match AimAssistTargetPoints, minus the extra information
; of bHighAnim, bValidBulletMag, and BoneOffsets.  It is used for threaded
; checking of targets, so it cannot be a struct.
+AimAssistCheckBones=Right_Eye
+AimAssistCheckBones=Left_Eye
+AimAssistCheckBones=BackSling
+AimAssistCheckBones=ChestSling
+AimAssistCheckBones=Spine2
+AimAssistCheckBones=L_Wrist
+AimAssistCheckBones=R_Wrist
+AimAssistCheckBones=L_Shoulder
+AimAssistCheckBones=R_Shoulder
+AimAssistCheckBones=L_Elbow
+AimAssistCheckBones=R_Elbow
+AimAssistCheckBones=Pelvis
+AimAssistCheckBones=L_Knee
+AimAssistCheckBones=R_Knee
+AimAssistCheckBones=L_Ankle
+AimAssistCheckBones=R_Ankle
+AimAssistCheckBones=L_Toe
+AimAssistCheckBones=R_Toe

; bHighAnim indicates the target point has a lot of translation when animating
; bValidBulletMag indicates availability of the target for bullet magnetism
+AimAssistTargetPoints=(BoneName=Right_Eye, bHighAnim=false, bValidBulletMag=false, BoneOffset=(X=-3.000000,Y=0.000000,Z=0.000000))
+AimAssistTargetPoints=(BoneName=Left_Eye, bHighAnim=false, bValidBulletMag=false, BoneOffset=(X=-3.000000,Y=0.000000,Z=0.000000))
+AimAssistTargetPoints=(BoneName=BackSling, bHighAnim=false, bValidBulletMag=true, BoneOffset=(X=4.000000,Y=0.000000,Z=0.000000))
+AimAssistTargetPoints=(BoneName=ChestSling, bHighAnim=false, bValidBulletMag=true)
+AimAssistTargetPoints=(BoneName=Spine2, bHighAnim=false, bValidBulletMag=true)
+AimAssistTargetPoints=(BoneName=L_Wrist, bHighAnim=false, bValidBulletMag=true)
+AimAssistTargetPoints=(BoneName=R_Wrist, bHighAnim=false, bValidBulletMag=true)
+AimAssistTargetPoints=(BoneName=L_Shoulder, bHighAnim=false, bValidBulletMag=true)
+AimAssistTargetPoints=(BoneName=R_Shoulder, bHighAnim=false, bValidBulletMag=true)
+AimAssistTargetPoints=(BoneName=L_Elbow, bHighAnim=false, bValidBulletMag=true)
+AimAssistTargetPoints=(BoneName=R_Elbow, bHighAnim=false, bValidBulletMag=true)
+AimAssistTargetPoints=(BoneName=Pelvis, bHighAnim=false, bValidBulletMag=true)
+AimAssistTargetPoints=(BoneName=L_Knee, bHighAnim=true, bValidBulletMag=true)
+AimAssistTargetPoints=(BoneName=R_Knee, bHighAnim=true, bValidBulletMag=true)
+AimAssistTargetPoints=(BoneName=L_Ankle, bHighAnim=true, bValidBulletMag=true)
+AimAssistTargetPoints=(BoneName=R_Ankle, bHighAnim=true, bValidBulletMag=true)
+AimAssistTargetPoints=(BoneName=L_Toe, bHighAnim=true, bValidBulletMag=true)
+AimAssistTargetPoints=(BoneName=R_Toe, bHighAnim=true, bValidBulletMag=true)

[Engine.AutoTestManager]
bExitOnCyclesComplete=true
NumAutomatedMapTestingCycles=1
+AutomatedMapTestingList=BDX_Breach_EX_Benchmark
+AutomatedMapTestingList=BDX_Lockdown_EX_Benchmark
+AutomatedMapTestingList=BDX_Siege_EX_Benchmark
+AutomatedMapTestingList=FLO_ColdFront_Benchmark
+AutomatedMapTestingList=FLO_Downtown_EX_Benchmark
+AutomatedMapTestingList=FLO_Hospital_EX_Benchmark
+AutomatedMapTestingList=FLO_Slums_Benchmark

; This allows enable/disabling kicking players that haven't first logged into their AAU account
; on authorized (non LAN) servers.
[AAGame.AASteamClientAuthentication]
bKickIfNoAAUAccount=true

[AAGame.AASteamServerAuthentication]
bDisableMBSUpdatingMessage=true

[AAGame.AAOnlineGameSearch]
AutoCreateOnlineGameFallback=true
ShortTimer=0.001
SearchWaitTime=1.5
SearchRetryTime=3.5
CancelFinalizeTime=3.0
HostWaitPhaseTime=30
PartyLeaderTime=2.0
SonyQueriesMax=2
SearchRoundMax=3
+MaxPingPerRound=60
+MaxPingPerRound=100
+MaxPingPerRound=140
+MaxPingPerRound=200

[AAGame.AAPrivateGameSettings]
RoundCount=6
FriendlyFire=true
MaxRevives=1
UseRoles=true
AllowAimAssist=true
AllowSpectator=false
UseDedicatedServer=true

[AkAudio.AkComponent]
OcclusionUpdateFrequency=0.4f
OcclusionUpdateRandomization=0.2f
OcclusionInterpolationTime=0.35f
BSPMinOcclusion=0.1
BSPMaxOcclusion=0.4
BSPMinOcclusionThickness=50
BSPMaxOcclusionThickness=600
BSPMinObstruction=0.0
BSPMaxObstruction=0.5
BSPMinObstructionThickness=50
BSPMaxObstructionThickness=400
MaxOcclusionDistance=7000.0f

[AAGame.AADebugCommands]
CommandWidgetX=10
CommandWidgetY=150

; Base config
[AAGame.AAWeapon]
AimAdhesionConfiguration=(bEnabled=false, StandardStrength=500, SightedStrength=600, MinDistance=0.0, MaxDistance=6000.0, OuterRadius=0.981, InnerRadius=0.9994)
BulletMagnetismConfiguration=(bEnabled=false, StandardStrength=0.0, SightedStrength=0.0, MinDistance=0.0, MaxDistance=0.0, OuterRadius=0.0, InnerRadius=0.0)
TightAimSnapConfiguration=(bEnabled=true, StandardStrength=2250, SightedStrength=0, MinDistance=0.0, MaxDistance=0, OuterRadius=0.987, InnerRadius=0)
MinAimAssistDistance=100.0
MaxAimAssistDistance=10000.0
; This min/max act as an extra scalar on aim adhesion for pawns that are obscured by cover.  At a certain distance, it will also effect the strength.
MinVisiblePawnPercent=0.00004
MaxVisiblePawnPercent=0.0004
; AimFrictionConfiguration=(bEnabled=false, StandardStrength=0.0, SightedStrength=0.0, MinDistance=0.0, MaxDistance=0.0, OuterRadius=0.0, InnerRadius=0.5)

; misc
[AAGame.AAWeap_Scope]

; group 1
[AAGame.AAWeap_M9Pistol]
AimAdhesionConfiguration=(bEnabled=true, StandardStrength=1700, SightedStrength=2050, MinDistance=500.0, MaxDistance=6000.0, OuterRadius=0.968, InnerRadius=0)
[AAGame.AAWeap_M1911Pistol]
[AAGame.AAWeap_CZ2Pistol]
[AAGame.AAeap_DevHandgun]

; group 2
[AAGame.AAWeap_Shotgun]
AimAdhesionConfiguration=(bEnabled=true, StandardStrength=1700, SightedStrength=2050, MinDistance=500.0, MaxDistance=6000.0, OuterRadius=0.968, InnerRadius=0)
[AAGame.AAWeap_M870Shotgun]
[AAGame.AAWeap_SuperNovaShotgun]

; group 3
[AAGame.AAWeap_M4A1Rifle]
AimAdhesionConfiguration=(bEnabled=true, StandardStrength=1700, SightedStrength=2050, MinDistance=100.0, MaxDistance=6000.0, OuterRadius=0.968, InnerRadius=0)
[AAGame.AAWeap_AK105Rifle]

; group 4
[AAGame.AAWeap_M16A4Rifle]
AimAdhesionConfiguration=(bEnabled=true, StandardStrength=1700, SightedStrength=2050, MinDistance=100.0, MaxDistance=6000.0, OuterRadius=0.968, InnerRadius=0)
[AAGame.AAWeap_AK107Rifle]
